name: Maintenance report
description: Report maintenance tasks, refactoring, or housekeeping needs
labels: maintenance
---

**What needs maintenance?**
Describe the area that requires maintenance (e.g., code cleanup, dependency updates, documentation improvements).

**Why is maintenance needed?**
Explain the benefits of this maintenance (e.g., performance, readability, security).

**Proposed actions**
List specific actions to be taken.

**Additional context**
Add any other context here.
